title: Harden Keep move verification after live 409
description: User still receives Moved file verification failed on Keep and in-use count does not update because the keep API returns 409. Investigate live workflow and decide whether to make verification capacity-based or reconcile successful moves after a verification miss.
close_reason: Handled live Keep false-negative verification and stale folder count after move

title: Require Keep confirmation and harden move verification
description: Why: Keep now moves files without deleting torrent leftovers, but it should still require explicit confirmation before moving files. Users are also seeing Moved file verification failed after a file appears to move successfully, likely because exact destination stat fails while folder scans still see the file; capacity does not update because Keep returns an error. Update confirmation flow and verify moved files using the same folder-scan pattern as folder capacity.
close_reason: Restored Keep confirmation and hardened move verification using folder scan

title: Investigate Keep cleanup workflow split
description: Why: current Keep workflow may delete unmarked torrent leftovers immediately after moving marked files, but desired product behavior may require Keep to only move kept files and leave deletion to an explicit later Delete action. Need inspect current move verification and cleanup sequencing, then update workflow if requested.
close_reason: Implemented Keep as move-only; Delete remains explicit destructive cleanup

title: Prioritize review keybinds over media controls
description: When the embedded video has focus, browser/media element controls can consume review key presses before the app handles them. The review workbench should handle its configured keybinds first unless the user is typing in an input-like target.
close_reason: Fixed by handling review keydown listener in capture phase and adding a focused-video regression test.

title: Fix Added on sort when timestamp missing
description: Added on asc/desc is a no-op when the running backend does not include addedOnSeconds. Add a regression test and fallback ordering so direction changes visibly, while keeping qBittorrent added_on as the primary sort key.
close_reason: Completed Added on missing-timestamp fallback

title: Fix review queue sort and workbench polish
description: User reports Added on descending does not match qBittorrent and requested review workbench UI cleanup, candidate list sizing, external-open pause behavior, delete wording, automatic advance, and action toasts.
close_reason: Completed sort accuracy and workbench UI updates

title: Fit review workbench controls inside viewport
description: Why this exists: media preview expansion made the workbench too tall, hiding buttons/candidates instead of fitting the review controls within the viewport. What needs doing: constrain shell/center layout to viewport height, make preview consume only remaining space, keep candidate/action controls visible, and verify tests plus desktop/mobile browser smoke.
close_reason: Completed

title: Modernize workbench styling and add Windows folder pickers
description: Why this exists: the qBittorrent review workbench should keep its current layout but get a more polished modern visual treatment, and settings paths should be selectable through a real PC folder picker instead of manual text-only entry. What needs doing: refresh colors/buttons/controls without changing layout, add backend Windows folder picker endpoint, wire Browse buttons for downloads/session paths, and verify tests plus browser smoke.
close_reason: Completed: modernized workbench skin, added Windows folder picker API and Browse controls, verified tests/typecheck/build/browser smoke.

title: Track Keep cleanup failures as attention work
description: Why this exists: the product plan requires qBittorrent cleanup failures after successful Keep moves to preserve kept files, move the torrent out of normal review into cleanup-failed attention work, and require explicit retry. Current Keep leaves moved files but returns a generic failure and the next queue refresh can keep the torrent in normal review. What needs doing: add backend tests and implementation for cleanup-failed state, expose cleanup_failed attention items from /api/queue, add explicit cleanup retry route, and preserve destructive deleteFiles=true confirmation semantics.
close_reason: Completed: cleanup failures now become attention work with explicit retry route and UI handling, verified by backend/frontend tests.

title: Map Windows session folders for WSL filesystem operations
description: Why this exists: real settings currently contain a Windows session folder path, but the backend counts and moves files with pathlib on Linux, so Keep capacity and moves would fail or count zero incorrectly. What needs doing: map Windows drive paths like C:\Users\... to /mnt/c/... for session folder filesystem operations while preserving display settings, add tests for public folderCount and Keep using a Windows session folder, and keep download path mapping/root checks intact.
close_reason: Mapped Windows session folders to WSL mount paths for folder counts and Keep moves; verified with backend tests and browser smoke.

title: Harden armed Keep and Reject confirmations
description: Why this exists: the product plan requires Keep/Reject armed states to be explicit, short-lived, and cancelled safely. Current UI has Reject inline confirmation but Keep only changes button text, and armed states do not expire after 8 seconds. What needs doing: add focused reducer/component coverage, add 8-second armed timeout cancellation, show inline Keep confirmation when unmarked video leftovers would be deleted, preserve Reject confirmation and destructive-action rules, and verify.
close_reason: Implemented 8-second armed confirmation timeout and inline Keep destructive warning with tests and browser verification.

title: Complete queue polling and vanished torrent workflow
description: Why this exists: the full local qBittorrent plan requires queue auto-polling, refresh after settings save, and a safe vanished-active-torrent state instead of auto-advancing when qBittorrent no longer returns the selected torrent. What needs doing: add focused frontend state/UI tests, implement 15-second polling paused while hidden, refresh queue after settings save, preserve vanished active selection with Keep/Reject disabled, and verify without weakening destructive Keep/Reject rules.
close_reason: Implemented queue auto-polling, settings-save refresh, vanished active torrent state, and destructive-action blocking with tests and browser verification.

title: Implement real qBittorrent review queue UI
description: Build the real full-stack local review queue against qBittorrent WebUI at http://localhost:8080, replacing frontend mock runtime data with FastAPI-backed queue/detail/media/open/Keep/Reject workflows and selected dark qBittorrent-style UI. Preserve destructive workflow rules: Reject confirmation before deleteFiles=true, Keep moves and verifies marked files before cleanup, and capacity blocks Keep before moves.
close_reason: Implemented and verified; live qBittorrent queue requires valid local credentials to connect.

title: Add execution history log
description: Add an app-specific history of review actions such as moved kept candidates and confirmed torrent deletes. Scope should avoid mirroring noisy qBittorrent connection/API logs and preserve local destructive-action rules.

title: Optimize frontend review workbench performance
description: Diagnose and improve UI performance for the Vite React review workbench. Measure current behavior, fix the highest-impact frontend bottleneck without changing destructive review semantics, then run focused verification.
close_reason: Optimized MediaStage video preload behavior and verified frontend tests/build

title: Move toast viewport to top center
description: Position toast notifications at the top middle of the review workbench while preserving existing toast behavior and responsive width.
close_reason: Completed

title: Add mute keyboard shortcut
description: Add M as a keyboard shortcut for the media mute control and cover the behavior with the focused keyboard test.
close_reason: Completed

title: Show moved candidates and preserve Keep folder count
description: After Keep, make moved candidate rows visually obvious and prevent stale queue/settings refresh from reverting the in-use counter when navigating to another torrent.
close_reason: Moved candidates now show distinct state and Keep folder count is preserved across stale refreshes

title: Speed up Keep after successful move
description: Keep now works but stalls noticeably because destination visibility waiting can block after successful move. Remove or shorten synchronous wait while preserving move-only safety and folder count behavior.
close_reason: Removed blocking destination visibility wait after successful Keep move

title: Adjust review header controls and capacity copy
description: User wants the capacity pill to show how many session slots are in use instead of slots left, and wants the mute button grouped directly beside Open External without the current large gap.
close_reason: Completed: capacity pill now shows slots in use and preview actions are grouped so mute sits directly beside Open External.

title: Fix review workbench toast copy and live state
description: User reported confusing keep verification toast copy, reject wording should become delete, toast punctuation should be trimmed, slots-left capacity should update after keeps and refresh, initial selection should match top sorted queue item, opened status panel should be removed, and a global mute control should sit left of Open External.
close_reason: Completed: fixed move verification retry, Delete wording, toast punctuation, live slots-left display, sorted initial selection, action-status removal, and global mute control with tests and browser smoke.

title: Fix button icon text alignment
description: Button labels render slightly lower than their icons in the review action bar and settings control. Align icon and text vertically without changing button behavior.
close_reason: Fixed shared button label/icon vertical alignment.

title: Polish command button alignment and dev startup
description: Fix command button icon/text vertical alignment, change Keep action icon, and add an easy command to run backend and frontend together.
close_reason: Polished command button alignment and added combined dev start

title: Implement layout A split key controls
description: Implement the selected Layout A mockup in the Vite React UI: simplified queue header, qBittorrent API status beside URL, removed queue filter blocks, review controls in one row with split-key shortcut cells, and no separate review block or leftovers metric.
close_reason: Implemented layout A split-key controls

title: Create layout A key display variants
description: Update queue control redesign mockup to show only the selected layout A structure, with several variants that explore different visible keyboard shortcut treatments.
close_reason: Updated mockup to show only Layout A with three shortcut display variants

title: Refine layout A shortcut styling
description: Refine the selected layout A mockup by replacing messy floating keycap badges with cleaner integrated shortcut labels while preserving compact icon-forward controls.
close_reason: Replaced floating keycaps with integrated shortcut labels

title: Revise mockup key hints and confirmation differences
description: Update queue control mockups to clarify the difference between variants A and C, show where Keep/Reject confirmation appears, and add visible keyboard shortcut hints back to icon controls without expanding the layout.
close_reason: Updated mockups with key hints and explicit confirmation-state variant

title: Create review queue redesign HTML mockups
description: Create static HTML mockups for queue/review layout alternatives requested by user: simplified queue header, qBittorrent status beside URL, icon-first controls, right-aligned review actions, and no leftovers delete section.
close_reason: Completed no-right-panel HTML mockups

title: Remove candidate ordering and index copy
description: Candidates UI currently labels the list as largest first and shows qBittorrent file indexes on each row. Remove those bits of display copy while keeping underlying fileIndex behavior unchanged.
close_reason: Completed

title: Refine workbench order and WSL root picker
description: Make the queue/torrent selector appear first on all viewports, reorder review navigation buttons, verify video autoplay remains unmuted, and add a browse button for the WSL downloads root settings field.
close_reason: Updated torrent selector order, review button order, unmuted autoplay verification, and WSL downloads root browse behavior

title: Refine queue control mockup A
description: Refine the HTML queue control mockup so Mockup A has a smaller review section, removes redundant top-right API status, and keeps connection/refresh state in the queue rail.
close_reason: Refined Mockup A review dock and removed redundant header API indicator

title: Mock up consolidated queue controls
description: Create HTML mockups that reduce redundant review queue controls, remove the bottom status/keybind bar, relocate refresh status, and add queue sort options for name, size, and added date with ascending/descending directions.
close_reason: Completed HTML mockups for consolidated queue controls

title: Update review workbench controls
description: Adjust keyboard shortcuts, defaults, refresh cadence, and settings/empty-state UI per current review workflow request.
close_reason: Implemented requested review workbench keybind, default, refresh, and UI adjustments; verified with tests, build, and browser smoke.

title: Polish workbench density and auto-scroll queue rail
description: Why this exists: selected torrent should stay visible in the queue rail as keyboard navigation moves down, and the current workbench styling still reads too bold and bubbly. What needs doing: add queue rail auto-scroll behavior, flatten/simplify button and typography styling, reduce unnecessary bold weights, preserve current layout and destructive workflow, then verify tests/typecheck/build/browser smoke.
close_reason: Completed: queue rail auto-scrolls active torrent into view, controls and typography were flattened/reduced, and tests/typecheck/build/browser smoke passed.

title: Autoplay and enlarge media preview
description: Why this exists: review videos should start playing automatically and use as much of the preview stage as possible for faster inspection. What needs doing: enable reliable video autoplay in the media stage, expand preview sizing without changing the workbench layout, and verify frontend tests/typecheck plus browser smoke.
close_reason: Completed: media preview now autoplays muted/inline, fills preview stage, mobile stage is aspect-aware, and frontend verification/browser smoke passed.

title: Create implementation handoff
description: Capture current qBittorrent-theme mockup decisions, Tailwind/shadcn setup requirement, and next-session implementation focus in a temporary handoff document.
close_reason: Created temporary implementation handoff document with Tailwind/shadcn requirement.

title: Adjust qBittorrent mockup status chrome
description: User wants to see qBittorrent mockup without File/Edit/View/Tools/Help menu and with folder/session item count surfaced above filters while retaining candidate-local capacity context.
close_reason: Removed mock desktop menu and added rail status cards for completed/session/API above filters; regenerated screenshots.

title: Revise qBittorrent mockup for dark keyboard layout
description: Update docs/mockups/qbittorrent-theme.html to match user preference: dark qBittorrent-like layout, no right candidate rail, video in middle, candidates in bottom middle, and all visible button keybinds left-hand only.
close_reason: Updated qBittorrent mockup to dark two-column layout with left-hand keybind labels and regenerated screenshots.

title: Create review queue HTML mockup variants
description: User requested three standalone clickable HTML mockups in docs/mockups: Iron Ledger, qBittorrent-themed, and dense keyboard-first power-user directions, with desktop/mobile screenshots and a local live view server. Do not edit frontend/src.
close_reason: Completed three standalone mockups, screenshot set, and local live picker.

title: Refresh impeccable product and design context
description: Why this exists: impeccable teach was requested to refresh both PRODUCT.md and DESIGN.md so future UI work has current product strategy and visual rules. What needs doing: update both root context files, keep repo constraints intact, and verify documentation/format sanity.
close_reason: Refreshed PRODUCT.md, DESIGN.md, and docs/design.json for impeccable teach.

title: Create UI mockups and refreshed design direction
description: Why this exists: the review queue needs concrete UI mockups, a refreshed color direction, and design documentation before deeper UI implementation. What needs doing: inspect current frontend, produce mockup artifacts, update design docs with colors/layout/component rules, and verify relevant checks.
close_reason: Completed UI mockups, refreshed design tokens, app color update, and verification.

title: Extract workbench CSS into focused modules
description: Why this exists: implementing the Mockup A workbench pushed frontend/src/styles.css over the 800-line guardrail. What needs doing: split queue rail, media stage, review dock, candidates, settings, and shared button/status styles into focused CSS files or an equivalent local styling structure without changing behavior.
